underlying_goal: Implement a multi-phase ArXiv literature analysis pipeline to narrow ~1,200 agentic AI papers down to ~150 high-value papers with deep analyses to inform the GSD Reflect project's design
friction_detail: Semantic Scholar API rate limits required switching to OpenAlex with a regex fix, triage agents hit output token limits requiring chunked writes, synthesis agent exceeded context limits requiring splitting into sub-agents, and citation data was never passed to reading agents.
brief_summary: User wanted a large-scale ArXiv paper analysis pipeline with parallel agents to identify and deeply analyze 150 high-value papers on agentic AI; the pipeline completed successfully despite API, token limit, and data integration issues.
